channel.title: JLT Travel Collection
channel.description: Featured offers from JLT Group's travel partners

item.title: вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Highlights of Vietnam, Celebrating 30 Years рҹҢҸ
item.description:
вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Highlights of Vietnam, Celebrating 30 Years рҹҢҸ
Nineteen days from Hanoi's back-street food stalls to the quiet beaches of Phu Quoc, threaded with private guides, an overnight cruise through Bai Tu Long Bay, and sunrise access to the citadel at Hue. Built to mark Audley Travel's 30th anniversary, this is Vietnam at an unhurried pace.
For travellers who want the full sweep of the country without the coach-tour compromise. рҹ§ӯ
вңЁ What makes this special: вҶ’ Hanoi with a private guide, then a small-group street food tour led by a local food blogger рҹҚң вҶ’ Overnight cruise through Bai Tu Long Bay, the quieter, more immersive alternative to Halong рҹӣ¶ вҶ’ Sunrise access to Hue's ancient citadel, followed by a countryside cycle past rice paddies and garden homes рҹҡҙ вҶ’ The Hai Van Pass south to UNESCO-listed Hoi An, with private-guide time in its car-free ancient streets рҹҸ® вҶ’ Sunset cruise along the Mekong Delta aboard the Legacy Mekong рҹҢ… вҶ’ Days of unwinding on Phu Quoc island to close the journey рҹҸқ
Nineteen days, six regions, and every logistical piece handled: international and domestic flights, private guides throughout, all accommodation, and 24-hour support on the ground. Ideal for travellers who want depth over dashing between highlights.
Nineteen days across Hanoi, Bai Tu Long Bay, Hue, Hoi An, the Mekong Delta and Phu Quoc, from ВЈ7,430pp рҹ—ә
Ready to see Vietnam at a pace that actually lets you feel it? рҹҢҸ Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk рҹ“©
#Vietnam #LuxuryTravel #TailorMadeTravel #AsiaEscapes #TheJLTCollection

item.title: вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Treasures of Sicily Small Group Escorted Tour, Sicily рҹҢӢ
item.description:
вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Treasures of Sicily Small Group Escorted Tour, Sicily рҹҢӢ
Eight days across Sicily with a maximum group of eighteen, taking in ancient Greek temples, Mount Etna, Taormina's Baroque streets, and Palermo's Arabic-influenced markets. Exclusive to Citalia, with English-speaking guides throughout and 4-star accommodation.
Ideal if you want the depth of an expert-guided tour without the coach-party feel of a bigger group. рҹҸӣпёҸ
вңЁ What makes this special: вҶ’ Ancient Greek temples, ruins, and theatre dating back thousands of years, exclusive to Citalia рҹҸӣпёҸ вҶ’ Mount Etna, Europe's largest active volcano, with smoke rising from the crater рҹҢӢ вҶ’ Taormina's cobbled streets and Baroque architecture overlooking the Mediterranean рҹҸҳпёҸ вҶ’ Palermo's Capo Market with a local guide and street food shaped by Arabic, Mediterranean, and Italian influences рҹҚў вҶ’ A traditional Sicilian winery for Etna wines and appetisers рҹҚ· вҶ’ UNESCO-listed CefalГ№ Cathedral and its Arabian bathhouse from Norman times рҹ•Ң
Small group of six to eighteen guests, with departures on 09 September and 23 September 2026. The itinerary covers Catania, Piazza Armerina's Roman Villa, CefalГ№, Palermo, Taormina, and Mount Etna.
Eight days, six historic locations, maximum eighteen guests рҹ—әпёҸ
Ready to walk Sicily's ancient streets with an expert local guide? рҹҢӢ Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk рҹ“©
#Sicily #EscortedTour #ItalyTravel #Citalia #TheJLTCollection

item.title: вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Flavours of Tuscany, Rome & Amalfi, Italy рҹҮ®рҹҮ№
item.description:
вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Flavours of Tuscany, Rome & Amalfi, Italy рҹҮ®рҹҮ№
вҶ’ Begin your Italian adventure with a guided tour of Florence, exploring centuries of Renaissance art and culture вҶ’ Journey into the Chianti wine region for a traditional pasta-making class and vineyard visit вҶ’ Discover the medieval gems of Lucca, the Leaning Tower of Pisa, and the hilltop city of Siena on a scenic full-day excursion вҶ’ Spend two days in Rome with a guided city tour and free time to explore the vibrant Campo de' Fiori market вҶ’ Uncover the ancient wonders of Pompeii before soaking up the breathtaking beauty of the Amalfi Coast вҶ’ 10 nights in superior-rated hotels with daily breakfast and three evening meals included throughout
From ВЈ1,599 per person | bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk рҹ“©
**#Italy** **#Tuscany** **#AmalfiCoast** **#EscortedTours** **#TheJLTCollection**

item.title: вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Fascinating Southeast Asia, Cambodia to Myanmar рҹҢҸ
item.description:
вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Fascinating Southeast Asia, Cambodia to Myanmar рҹҢҸ
Twenty-nine days across five countries, from the temples of Angkor to the pagoda plains of Bagan, with domestic flights and private transport woven in throughout. Fascinating Southeast Asia is built for travellers who want the region properly, not in fragments.
A comprehensive route through the cultural heart of Southeast Asia, at a pace that lets each country register. рҹ§ӯ
вңЁ What makes this special: вҶ’ Temples of Angkor in Siem Reap, the vast UNESCO Khmer temple complex рҹҸӣпёҸ вҶ’ Cu Chi Tunnels and Mekong Delta floating villages in Vietnam рҹӣ¶ вҶ’ Overnight cruise on Halong Bay, sleeping among the limestone karsts рҹҢҠ вҶ’ Luang Prabang's saffron-robed monks, gilded temples, and Mekong sunsets рҹҢ… вҶ’ Ethical elephant sanctuary encounter in the northern Thai highlands рҹҗҳ вҶ’ Thousands of ancient pagodas sweeping across the plains of Bagan at sunrise рҹҢ„
Small groups of 2вҖ“13+ travellers, with English or French-speaking guides, domestic flights, private air-conditioned transport, and all entrance fees included from Bangkok to Bangkok. Suited to culture and heritage travellers who want the full arc of the region in one considered journey.
*Twenty-nine days, five countries, one continuous route from Angkor to Bagan* рҹ—әпёҸ
Ready to travel Southeast Asia the way it deserves? рҹҢҸ Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk рҹ“©
**#SoutheastAsia #CulturalTravel #Angkor #Bagan #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Japan Unveiled, Tokyo to Osaka рҹ—ҫ
item.description:
вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Japan Unveiled, Tokyo to Osaka рҹ—ҫ
Sixteen days across eight destinations, from Tokyo's neon streets to Miyajima's floating torii gate, with a tour manager handling every logistic along the way. Newmarket Holidays' fully-escorted programme covers the headline sights and the quieter historic towns most first-timers miss.
Ideal if you want to see the real depth of Japan without piecing together bullet trains, hotels and translations yourself. рҹҚө
вңЁ What makes this special: вҶ’ Traditional tea ceremony participation in Tokyo and a wagashi sweet-making lesson рҹҚө вҶ’ Mount Fuji viewing from Lake Kawaguchi and the Hakone Ropeway рҹ—» вҶ’ Matsumoto Castle, Japan's oldest surviving wooden castle рҹҸҜ вҶ’ Arashiyama Bamboo Grove walk in Kyoto and Nara's 1,200 protected deer рҹҰҢ вҶ’ Miyajima Island's 12th-century floating torii gate and Hiroshima Peace Memorial рҹ•ҠпёҸ вҶ’ Return UK flights, 13 nights' accommodation, 11 guided excursions and a dedicated tour manager throughout вңҲпёҸ
Sixteen days covering Tokyo, Mount Fuji, Matsumoto, Kanazawa, Kyoto, Nara, Hiroshima and Osaka, with departures from September 2026 through November 2028. Built for couples and solo travellers who want a comprehensive first trip to Japan with the logistics handled.
*11 guided excursions, 13 nights, two bullet train journeys, and one dedicated tour manager from arrival to departure* рҹҡ„
Ready to see Japan properly? рҹ—ҫ Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk рҹ“©
**#Japan #EscortedTour #CulturalTravel #NewmarketHolidays #TheJLTCollection**

item.title: вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Classic Botswana & Victoria Falls рҹҗҳ
item.description:
вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Classic Botswana & Victoria Falls рҹҗҳ
Nine days across three of southern Africa's most extraordinary wildlife destinations, starting with two nights overlooking Victoria Falls and ending deep in the Okavango Delta. Big Five sightings, mokoro canoe excursions, and the highest density of African elephants on the planet, all stitched together with included internal charter flights.
Built for travellers who want genuine wilderness without the logistics headache. рҹҢ…
вңЁ What makes this special: вҶ’ Two nights at Ilala Lodge Hotel overlooking the largest sheet of falling water on earth, seen from the Zimbabwean side рҹ’Ұ вҶ’ Three fully inclusive nights at Chobe Elephant Camp on a river home to the planet's highest elephant density рҹҗҳ вҶ’ Three fully inclusive nights at Rra Dinare Camp in the Okavango Delta's NG32 private concession рҹӣ¶ вҶ’ Big Five plus cheetah, wild dog, sable, roan antelope, hippo and crocodile across all three locations рҹҰҒ вҶ’ Mokoro traditional canoe excursions, bush walks, day and night game drives included рҹҢҝ вҶ’ Internal charter flights from Kasane to Santawani Airstrip and Santawani to Maun Airport included вңҲпёҸ
Nine days, eight nights, three destinations, available year round. Ideal for travellers who want the full Botswana arc: thundering falls, elephant country, and the quiet water of the Delta.
Ready to explore Botswana from Victoria Falls to the Okavango? Email bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk рҹ“©
#Botswana #VictoriaFalls #SafariTravel #OkavangoDelta #TheJLTCollection

item.title: вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Icons of Japan, Osaka to Tokyo рҹ—ҫ
item.description:
вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Icons of Japan, Osaka to Tokyo рҹ—ҫ
Seven nights across Osaka, Kyoto, Mount Fuji, Kamakura and Tokyo, with a bullet train ride at 200mph stitching the route together. Icons of Japan is built for first-time visitors who want the headline moments handled by an expert without losing the thrill of discovery.
Perfect if you've always wanted to see Japan properly but didn't know where to start. рҹҢё
вңЁ What makes this special: вҶ’ 7 nights in 4-star accommodation with breakfast included each morning рҹӣҸпёҸ вҶ’ Bullet train journey between cities at 200mph рҹҡ„ вҶ’ Expert Tour Manager with you throughout the trip рҹ§ӯ вҶ’ Guided Kyoto day taking in Kinkakuji golden temple, Nijo Castle and RyЕҚan-ji rock garden вӣ©пёҸ вҶ’ Evening walk through the Gion district with potential Geisha sightings рҹҢҷ вҶ’ Mount Fuji views from Lake Yamanaka and Lake Kawaguchi рҹ—»
Small group departures capped at 36 guests, with return flights and transfers built in. Ideal for first-time visitors to Japan who want depth and pace handled for them.
Five iconic stops, one tour, capped at 36 guests рҹ—ҫ
Ready to finally tick Japan off the list? рҹҢё Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk рҹ“©
#Japan #EscortedTours #BulletTrain #FirstTimeJapan #TheJLTCollection

item.title: вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Corfu to Athens - Meteora and Emerald Island рҹҢҚ
item.description:
вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Corfu to Athens - Meteora and Emerald Island рҹҢҚ
The Ionian going cobalt at Agios Gordios, bare feet on warm Meteora sandstone, then Plaka's evening tavernas spilling into the Athens night. Six days from Corfu's UNESCO Old Town to the Acropolis, built for travellers in their twenties and thirties who want a small group and proper time on the ground.
Perfect if you've been waiting for the right way to see more of Greece than one island. рҹҢ…
вңЁ What makes this special: вҶ’ Six-day journey from Corfu through Meteora to Athens рҹҢҚ вҶ’ Walking tour of Corfu Old Town, a UNESCO World Heritage Site рҹ“Қ вҶ’ Sunset hike at Agios Gordios with optional cliff jumping into the Ionian рҹҢ… вҶ’ Guided hike to the mountaintop monasteries of Meteora рҹҸ”пёҸ вҶ’ Orientation walk through Athens' historic Plaka neighbourhood рҹҸӣпёҸ вҶ’ Community visit to Shedia Home, a G Adventures-supported social enterprise рҹҢҝ
Small-group travel capped at 16 guests (averaging 12), with five breakfasts and a mix of hostel and hotel stays across six days. Designed for solo travellers and friend pairs aged 18 to 39 who want to cover ground without losing the detail.
Six days, three landmark stops, group size capped at sixteen рҹҸ”пёҸ
Ready to see Greece from the inside? рҹҢ… Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk рҹ“©
#Greece #Meteora #Corfu #AdventureTravel #TheJLTCollection

item.title: вңЁ Property Spotlight: Atrium Platinum Luxury Resort Hotel & Spa, Ixia, Rhodes рҹҢҠ
item.description:
вңЁ Property Spotlight: Atrium Platinum Luxury Resort Hotel & Spa, Ixia, Rhodes рҹҢҠ
Beachfront on Rhodes' west coast, four kilometres from Rhodes Town, with sea views running to the horizon. Atrium Platinum pairs a full-scale island resort with the largest hotel spa on Rhodes.
Perfect if you want a proper 5-star base with everything on-site, without giving up genuine Greek coastline. рҹҢ…
вңЁ What makes this special: вҶ’ Beachfront setting on Rhodes' west coast, four kilometres from historic Rhodes Town рҹҸ–пёҸ вҶ’ Aphrodite & Hermes Thalasso Spa Centre, the largest hotel spa on the island рҹ’ҶвҖҚвҷҖпёҸ вҶ’ Five dining venues including Porfyra rooftop gourmet and Koi Asian fusion рҹҚҪпёҸ вҶ’ Multiple outdoor pools plus tennis, squash, basketball and a fully equipped gym рҹҸҠвҖҚвҷҖпёҸ вҶ’ Rooms and suites with options for private pools, Jacuzzi baths and sea-view balconies рҹӣҸпёҸ вҶ’ Children's mini club and dedicated kids' pool for ages 4-12, six days a week рҹ‘ЁвҖҚрҹ‘©вҖҚрҹ‘§
Available for Summer 2026 and 2027 seasons, with wedding facilities, a shopping arcade and 24-hour reception on-site. Ideal for couples wanting spa-led downtime, families needing structured children's programmes, and groups celebrating a milestone.
*The largest hotel spa on Rhodes, four kilometres from Rhodes Town* рҹҢ…
Ready to book your Rhodes escape? рҹҢ… Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk рҹ“©
#Rhodes #GreekIslands #LuxuryTravel #FamilyResort #TheJLTCollection

item.title: вңЁ Property Spotlight: Sun Gardens Dubrovnik, Orasac рҹҢҠ
item.description:
вңЁ Property Spotlight: Sun Gardens Dubrovnik, Orasac рҹҢҠ
A five-star seafront resort in the Mediterranean village of Orasac, just 11km from Dubrovnik's UNESCO-listed Old Town. Sun Gardens is a Leading Hotels of the World member with six restaurants, an award-winning spa, and direct pebble-beach access to the Adriatic.
The rare Croatian resort that works equally well for families, couples, and adventurers under one roof. рҹҢ…
вңЁ What makes this special: вҶ’ Seafront setting overlooking the Adriatic and the Elaphiti Islands рҹҢҠ вҶ’ Award-winning spa with indoor pool, steam room, sauna and massages рҹ’ҶвҖҚвҷҖпёҸ вҶ’ Six dining venues including Cilantro, The Market and The Butcher рҹҚҪпёҸ вҶ’ NUKU beach bar, three pool bars and the Differo Signature Bar рҹҚё вҶ’ Direct pebble-beach access to the Adriatic Sea рҹҸ–пёҸ вҶ’ Baby Club for 12 months to 3 years, plus seasonal children's facilities рҹ‘¶
Set amid manicured Mediterranean gardens with 201 rooms and suites plus 207 residences, offering space for everyone from couples to multi-generational families. Eleven kilometres from Dubrovnik's Old Town and the stunning architecture that draws travellers to the Dalmatian coast.
*Six restaurants, five bars, one award-winning spa, and direct sea accessвҖҰ all within a Leading Hotels of the World property* рҹҢ…
Ready to escape to the Dalmatian coast? рҹҢҠ Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk рҹ“©
#Dubrovnik #Croatia #LuxuryTravel #LeadingHotels #TheJLTCollection

item.title: вңЁ Cruise Spotlight: Windmills, Tulips & Belgian Delights, Netherlands & Belgium рҹҢ·
item.description:
вңЁ Cruise Spotlight: Windmills, Tulips & Belgian Delights, Netherlands & Belgium рҹҢ·
Eight days round-trip from Amsterdam aboard Scenic's 5-Star Space-Ship, sailing through Dutch waterways into Belgium at the peak of tulip season. Truly all-inclusive ultra-luxury with Keukenhof Gardens, Antwerp diamonds, and windmill-lined riverside scenery.
Spring on the rivers, when the bulbs are at their showiest and the ship carries just 163 guests. рҹҢё
вңЁ What makes this special: вҶ’ 8-day ultra-luxury river cruise round-trip from Amsterdam рҹҡў вҶ’ 5-Star Scenic Space-Ship carrying up to 163 guests, with Standard Suites or Balcony Suites featuring the Sun Lounge рҹӣҸпёҸ вҶ’ Keukenhof Gardens: 7 million flowering bulbs across almost 80 acres рҹҢ· вҶ’ 16 included Scenic Freechoice activities, from a sustainable cheese farm to the Delta Works barrier and after-hours Fabrique des LumiГЁres рҹҺЁ вҶ’ Visits to Antwerp (world's diamond capital), Veere, Arnhem and the baroque Palais Het Loo рҹ’Һ вҶ’ 20 meals plus complimentary premium beverages all day, every day рҹҘӮ
Sails during spring departures with up to 163 guests aboard. Ideal for couples and small groups who want the scenery of a river cruise with genuine ultra-luxury service.
*20 meals, unlimited premium beverages, 16 included shore activities across 8 days* рҹҚҪпёҸ
Ready to sail through tulip season in ultra-luxury? рҹҢ· Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk рҹ“©
#RiverCruise #Keukenhof #ScenicCruises #LuxuryTravel #TheJLTCollection

item.title: вңЁ Property Spotlight: Villa Altavista, Nerja рҹҢҠ
item.description:
вңЁ Property Spotlight: Villa Altavista, Nerja рҹҢҠ
Three air-conditioned bedrooms, a private pool, and two hire cars to explore the Costa del Sol at your own pace. Villa Altavista is built for families and friends who want the freedom of their own villa without the logistics of organising flights, transfers, and a car on top.
Perfect if you've been waiting for a late-September escape that pairs space with proper sunshine. рҹҢ…
вңЁ What makes this special: вҶ’ Private swimming pool with sun-soaked outdoor terrace рҹҸҠвҖҚвҷҖпёҸ вҶ’ Three air-conditioned bedrooms sleeping up to six guests рҹӣҸпёҸ вҶ’ Alfresco dining area and BBQ built for slow evenings outside рҹҚҪпёҸ вҶ’ Pool table and table tennis on-site for downtime between trips out рҹҺ® вҶ’ Two hire cars included for the full stay, so everyone moves freely рҹҢҚ вҶ’ Return flights from Gatwick with 23kg baggage included вңҲпёҸ
Sleeps up to six across three bedrooms, departing 22 September 2026. Ideal for families or two couples travelling together who want a full week of Mediterranean rhythm on a fixed all-in price.
Flights, two hire cars, and a private-pool villa in Nerja from ВЈ539 per person рҹҢ…
Ready to escape to your own private sanctuary? рҹҢ… Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk рҹ“©
#Nerja #CostaDelSol #VillaHoliday #SpainGetaway #TheJLTCollection

item.title: вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Arctic Explorer: Land of the Polar Bear, Svalbard рҹҗ»вҖҚвқ„пёҸ
item.description:
вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Arctic Explorer: Land of the Polar Bear, Svalbard рҹҗ»вҖҚвқ„пёҸ
Eleven days at the edge of the inhabited world, with seven nights aboard a 128-passenger expedition ship pushing through ice-laden fjords in search of polar bears, walruses, and whales. Travelsphere's partnership with G Adventures puts you on an Ice Class 1A vessel with the access and expertise these latitudes demand.
Perfect if you've been waiting for a polar expedition that pairs serious wildlife with proper logistics. рҹ§ӯ
вңЁ What makes this special: вҶ’ Seven nights aboard an Ice Class 1A ship across six expedition days through glacier-fed waterways рҹҡў вҶ’ Two off-ship Zodiac excursions daily, reaching shore landings and remote wildlife sites рҹӣҘпёҸ вҶ’ Wildlife watching for polar bears, Arctic foxes, walruses, reindeer, seals, and whales рҹҗ»вҖҚвқ„пёҸ вҶ’ Onboard specialist lectures in ornithology, marine biology, glaciology, and polar history рҹ’Ў вҶ’ Expert-to-guest ratio of 10:1 throughout the expedition рҹ§ӯ вҶ’ Two nights in Oslo plus one in Longyearbyen, with guided visits to the Fram Museum, Opera House, and Akershus Castle рҹҸӣпёҸ
Eleven days in total: two nights in Oslo, one in Longyearbyen, and seven aboard ship, with departures running July 2026 through July 2027. Built for adventure travellers and wildlife enthusiasts who want a polar expedition led by genuine specialists.
128-passenger small expedition ship, 10:1 expert-to-guest ratio, midnight sun on July departures вҳҖпёҸ
Ready to stand at the edge of the polar world? рҹҗ»вҖҚвқ„пёҸ Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk рҹ“©
#Svalbard #ArcticExpedition #PolarBears #WildlifeTravel #TheJLTCollection

item.title: вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Classic Japan, Japan рҹҮҜрҹҮө
item.description:
вңЁ Escape Spotlight: Classic Japan, Japan рҹҮҜрҹҮө
Eleven days from Kyoto's temples to Tokyo's neon, with a Shinkansen ride, a night in a working Buddhist monastery, and the slow walk between Tsumago and Matsumoto in between. Classic Japan is built for travellers who want the country's full sweep without the logistics of piecing it together solo.
A small group, an unhurried pace, and the depth that comes from staying in places most itineraries only glimpse. рҹҸҜ
вңЁ What makes this special: вҶ’ Eleven-day small-group journey through Kyoto, Koya-san, Hiroshima, Tsumago, Matsumoto, and Tokyo рҹ—ҫ вҶ’ Temple stay (Shukubo) in Koya-san and a night in a traditional ryokan рҹҸ® вҶ’ Fourteen included activities including Kinkaku-ji Golden Pavilion, Fushimi Inari, and Hiroshima Peace Memorial Park вӣ©пёҸ вҶ’ Travel by Shinkansen bullet train, local trains, and a Sumida River boat cruise in Tokyo рҹҡ„ вҶ’ Maximum twelve guests for an intimate small-group experience рҹ‘Ҙ вҶ’ Ten breakfasts and three dinners included, plus a Comfort-grade mix of ryokan, temple lodging, and hotels рҹҚұ
Capped at twelve guests aged fifteen and up, with departures running from August 2026. Ideal for solo travellers, couples, and families with older teens who want cultural depth without sacrificing comfort.
Eleven days, six regions, one country at the pace it asks to be seen рҹҸҜ
Ready to see Japan beyond the headline cities? рҹҡ„ Email: bookings@thejltgroup.co.uk рҹ“©
#ClassicJapan #JapanTour #SmallGroupTravel #CulturalTravel #TheJLTCollection
